source_excerpt: We currently expect 2026 capital expenditures to be approximately $2.2 billion.
notes: The source frames the 2026 capital expenditure figure as a forward-looking expectation ('We currently expect'), whereas the claim states it as a confirmed fact ('has confirmed that its 2026 capital expenditures will be'). This strips the hedge and overstates the certainty of the projection. The numeric figure ($2.2 billion) and the year (2026) match the source.
